creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: wg
Date: Sun Aug  3 11:45:50 UTC 2014
New revision: 363880
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/363880

Log:
  security/p5-openxpki: update to 0.14.0.1

  - Follow restructuring of the original software
    and absorb functionality from retired ports
    (cf. neighboring RPs about each of them):
    security/p5-openxpki-client,
    security/p5-openxpki-client-scep,
    security/p5-openxpki-deployment
  - Add CONFLICTS with the retired ports listed above.
  - Remove building of long developer docs
  - Follow LICENSE change of the original software.
  - Switch MASTER_SITES from SF to GH.

  PR:		191444
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Changes:
  head/security/p5-openxpki/Makefile
  head/security/p5-openxpki/distinfo
  head/security/p5-openxpki/files/
  head/security/p5-openxpki/files/openxpki.in
  head/security/p5-openxpki/pkg-descr
  head/security/p5-openxpki/pkg-message
  head/security/p5-openxpki/pkg-plist
